# Combat Escape: Prevent Player Escaping
**Combat Escape** is a server-side Minecraft mod for Fabric designed to prevent unfair gameplay on your server. With **Combat Escape**, you can ensure that players cannot escape combat unfairly. There is no command needed to activate the mod. When a player attacks another player, combat mode is triggered for both players. During this combat mode, if either player disconnects from the server, they will either **die** or **lose all their items**, depending on the configuration settings you have chosen.

For issues and feedback: (Email) lyki@lyki.dev or (Discord) https://go.lyki.dev/dc

### Config File
![configfile](https://i.imgur.com/nwY0prB.gif)
Through the config, you can adjust the Combat Type. Combat Type options are:

- kill: When a player disconnects during combat, they are killed and all their items drop on the ground.
- clear: When a player disconnects during combat, their inventory is completely cleared, and the player remains in place.
  
You can also customize the combat duration, should be seconds.

### Customizable Messages
![messages](https://i.imgur.com/Dc6us9U.gif)

You can fully customize the mod's messages to suit your preferences. The configuration file used for message customization supports HEX color codes. By prefixing a message with a HEX color code, the text will display in that color until the next HEX color code is encountered.
